message:
feat(widgets): add alpha compositing for semi-transparent backgrounds

Enhances set_style_area() to properly composite semi-transparent
background colors over existing cell backgrounds using src-over
blending. This allows layered UI effects where backgrounds with
alpha < 255 blend naturally with content beneath them.

Changes:
- Inline style application to preserve wide-character continuation cells
- Alpha channel handling: 0=noop, 255=replace, 1-254=composite
- New test: set_style_area_composites_alpha_bg_over_existing_bg
- Paragraph improvements for theme integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
